mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, user_id, reaction, created_at FROM site_post_reaction WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, reaction, created_at FROM site_post_reaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, reaction, created_at FROM site_post_reaction WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
